column1: review_text
The camera is excellent but the battery drains fast.
I received the product late because delivery was delayed.
Great screen quality and vibrant colors. Loved watching videos.
Price is too high for the performance it offers.
Customer service was helpful and resolved my issue quickly.
The design feels premium but the phone heats up sometimes.
Battery lasts long enough for a full day of use. Impressive!
Camera performs poorly in low light conditions.
Fast shipping and smooth checkout experience.
Performance is laggy when multitasking.
Screen is bright outdoors but has slight color shift.
Value for money is good considering the features.
Quality of materials feels cheap despite the high price.
Delivery was super fast, got it one day earlier.
Service center took too long to diagnose the issue.
Design is sleek and lightweight, very comfortable to hold.
Battery charging is slow and takes almost 2 hours.
Camera stabilization works great for videos.
Shipping box was damaged but product inside was fine.
Performance is smooth and consistent even with heavy apps.
